title: Semiconductor supply-chain layers
question: Which layer leads — and how much of it is just semiconductor beta?
finding: Completing the roster to 143 names barely moves the leaderboard (Spearman ρ 0.962; only EMS re-ranks, by dilution) — and read market-relative, only 6 of 13 layers beat the semis ETF (SMH); the rest are semiconductor beta.
